article.title: ChatGPT vs SEO Writing Tools - What Actually Ranks
article.body_markdown:
I tested ChatGPT against SEO-specific AI writers on the same keyword.

Same keyword: email marketing tips. Same length.

ChatGPT scored 38/100. No keyword in headings. No meta description. Generic AI fluff.

SEO-focused writer scored 82/100. Keyword everywhere. Auto meta tags. Real stats. Human tone.

The difference: ChatGPT was built to write anything. SEO tools are built to get you found on Google.

I built [SEO Spark](https://seospark.net) - AI blog posts that rank in 60 seconds. Free tier: 3 articles.
